name: Application Shell
description: Bootstraps the React SPA (main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html), applies global styles and Tailwind design tokens, and provides Vite's ambient type declarations.

name: Pages & Routes
description: One React component per route (login, checkout, dashboard, receiving, products, staff, voids, shop config), each composing API calls and auth/shop-scope context into the screens shown to shop staff, owners, and superadmins.

name: API Client
description: Typed HTTP client (client.ts) plus per-domain wrapper modules (checkout, products, catalog cache, lots, staff, voids, shops, dashboard, offline finalize-queue) that talk to the FastAPI backend and are imported by nearly every page.

name: Auth & Multi-Shop Context
description: React context providers and JWT helpers that manage the authenticated session and the superadmin's 'acting shop' scope, consumed across almost all pages and shared components.

name: Shared Components
description: Reusable UI building blocks — the PIN entry keypad, the superadmin shop-switcher dropdown, and the role-filtered navigation sidebar — shared across multiple pages.

name: Offline Resilience Hooks
description: Custom hooks that detect browser connectivity and drain the offline checkout queue, enabling the POS screen to keep working through network outages.

name: End-to-End Tests
description: Playwright specs covering login, checkout resilience, dashboard, products, receiving, shop config, staff, and void-approval flows, driven by role-specific login helpers.

name: Build & Tooling Configuration
description: Project manifest, TypeScript project references, ESLint, Vite, Tailwind/PostCSS, and Playwright configuration that govern how the SPA is built, linted, styled, and tested.
